use clap::Parser;
use std::path::PathBuf;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long)]
    output_dir: PathBuf,

    #[arg(long)]
    config: PathBuf,
}

fn run(cli: Cli) {
    std::fs::create_dir_all(&cli.output_dir).unwrap();
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(&cli.config).unwrap();
    let out = cli.output_dir.join("result.txt");
    std::fs::write(&out, data).unwrap();
}
